templates: I found {count} safety alerts for {city_label}. Top risks: {top_items}. Would you like only high-severity alerts?
Latest safety feed for {city_label} shows {count} active alerts. Key items: {top_items}. I can filter these by severity or type.
empty: I checked the latest safety feed for {city_label}, and there are no new alerts right now. I can keep monitoring this area for you.

templates: I found {count} recent incidents for {city_label}. Most recent: {latest_item}. Do you want this filtered by severity?
There are {count} incident records for {city_label}. Latest entry: {latest_item}. I can show only accidents or only severe cases.
empty: I could not find recent incident records for {city_label} in the selected time window. I can broaden the range and check again.

templates: For {city_label}, contact {service} at {phone_number}. {guidance} If this is critical, call now and share your exact landmark.
empty: I could not resolve an emergency number yet. Share incident type and city, for example: crash in Lahore or fire in Karachi.

templates: Recommended quick fix: {title}. Steps: {instructions}. I can also find nearby emergency support if needed.
Quick guidance for {title}: {instructions}. If the issue is urgent, I can route emergency contact right away.
empty: I could not find a verified quick-fix for that issue yet. Share a more specific vehicle issue and I will retry.

templates: I did not fully understand that yet. Are you asking about alerts, incidents, emergency contacts, or a quick fix in {city_label}?
I want to help accurately. Should I check alerts, incidents, emergency contact, or quick-fix guidance for {city_label}?
I am ready to help with live alerts, incidents, SOS contacts, and quick fixes. Start by sharing your city or issue.
RoadGuard assistant is active. Tell me your city and I will fetch alerts, incidents, emergency contacts, or quick-fix help.
Take care and drive safe. I am here anytime you need alerts, incidents, or SOS support.
Stay safe on the road. Come back anytime for safety updates or emergency routing.
